title: TRILICTRO'S Optimisations
description:
A lightweight Fabric 1.21 modpack build for smooth, stable, and high-FPS gameplay
Optimized with the best performance mods while keeping the vanilla feel intact.

Warning: It includes my video settings except keybinds
body:
**Optimized Vanilla – Fabric 1.21 Performance Modpack**


✨ **Overview**


This is a lightweight, high-performance Fabric 1.21 modpack built for maximum FPS, stability, and smooth gameplay on both low-end and mid-range systems.



It includes the best optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, and MoreCulling, while keeping the vanilla feel intact. Whether you’re on a laptop, older PC, or just want the smoothest possible Minecraft experience, this pack is for you.

🛠️ **Features**


🔥 **Performance & Rendering**


Sodium + Sodium Extra – modern rendering engine for huge FPS boosts

MoreCulling, Exordium, Enhanced Block Entities – smarter rendering, less lag

FerriteCore, ModernFix, BadOptimizations – lower RAM & faster memory handling

ImmediatelyFast, Kryton, Lithium – CPU-side optimizations and smoother gameplay



⚡ **Smooth Gameplay**


Noisium – optimized worldgen performance

Clumps – XP orbs merge to reduce entity lag

Very Many Players – optimized multiplayer handling for crowded servers

Marlow Crystal Optimizer – faster crystal rendering in PvP



🎮 **Quality of Life**


AppleSkin – shows hunger & saturation

Centered Crosshair – cleaner visuals

Skin Layer 3D – better player models

Gaama – brightness control

ModMenu + Cloth Config – easy mod management

Fabric API + Fabric Language Kotlin + PlaceholderAPI – mod compatibility support

🔧 **System Requirements**


Minimum RAM: 2 GB allocated

Recommended RAM: 3 GB allocated

Runs smoothly even on low-end CPUs/GPUs (tested on Ryzen 3 laptop with integrated graphics).

🎮 **Who Is This Pack For?**


Players on low-end or older systems

Anyone who wants vanilla gameplay but with huge FPS gains

Multiplayer players (optimized for servers with lots of entities/players)

PvP/PvE players needing crystal and entity performance boosts

**Note: This pack includes my own carefully tuned video settings, optimized for performance and competitive PvP clarity.
Feel free to change them to suit your system. Keybinds are not affected.**
